acceptanceRule: A placement is accepted only when at least two independent evidence channels (road, water, rail, survey identifiers, main-road gate) agree on the same transform. Human-placed runs are excluded from this set.
published: Downsampled review previews plus the acceptance record for each plan.
withheld: Transforms and GCPs, full-resolution warped rasters, source DP/RP scans, and the statewide research board — so this evidence can be reviewed but not reused as a georeferenced dataset.
